name: quality-gate
description: Add a fast local verification baseline with formatting, type checking, audit, unit tests, and coverage.

scripts.quality:gate:fast: npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run security:audit && npm run test:coverage

optionalScripts.quality:gate: npm run quality:gate:fast && npm run e2e

optionalSteps.name: browser-gate
optionalSteps.when: The target repo has or wants browser-visible behavior covered by Playwright.
optionalSteps.prompt: Do you want this quality-gate upgrade to add a Playwright browser gate as well?

docs: Document the fast gate as the normal local iteration check.
Document that coverage is required when src/ runtime code exists.
Record any target-project quality gate contract in durable docs.
notes: Adapt src/ globs before applying to repos with a different runtime source directory.
Do not weaken an existing target-project coverage policy without explicit approval.
